{{CargoRelic
|name=Horoscope
|rank=Blue
|affct=FTH
|birthday=02-20
|source=Lottery Machine (0.07%), Nebula Chest (2%), Novice Scrolls (1%), Wishing (2.1%)
|description=On Feb 20, 1459 BC, the Old Babylonian Empire drew this early astronomical map.

Babylonian priest, Sarikranu, discovered a dazzling star in the west and engraved what he saw on the stone for divination and prophecy. THe prophecy said a holy king would be born in the west. A few years later, traveling merchants from Greece delivered the news that on the day when the star appeared, a new Mycenaean prince was born. His name was Agamemnon. 

[Calculation System]

House system: Each horoscope sits in one house.

Equal division: From the ascendant, each house is 30 degrees

Alcabitius House System: Divides the quadrants from the ascendant to MC in three equal parts

Regiomontanus House System: Divides the celestial equator into 12 equal parts

Placidus Houses System: The most common astrological system

Koch House System: Am extension of the Placidus system
|fame=27
|art=32
|fth=47
|civ=29
|tech=19
|ss1=Wood rewards from offering +0.4%
|ss2=Wood rewards from offering +0.8%
|ss3=Wood rewards from offering +1.2%
|ss4=Wood rewards from offering +2%
|ss7=Wood rewards from offering +2%<br>Wood rewards from offering +2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill I.png|50px]] Place in Gene Sim Device: This Relic's FTH +5
}}

[[Category:Offering Reward Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
